citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Illustrate how understanding a sentence could be challenging for a computer by giving sentences where a prepositional phrase could attach in either of two places, and show how this ambiguity can sometimes be resolved based on meaning.
